docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WISHOM, MONIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, ANITA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
